title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres Asia Pacific Associates family as a Frontend Developer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
